analysis:
Based on the available agricultural knowledge,
        the crop may be experiencing environmental stress,
        pest pressure, or nutrient imbalance.
climate_warning:
Monitor weather conditions closely.
        High temperature and irregular rainfall
        can increase crop stress.
recommendations: Seek local agricultural support when necessary

problem: leaves are curling and turning yellow
analysis:
Possible tomato stress detected.

The symptoms may be related to:

• Tomato yellow leaf curl virus
• Nutrient deficiency
• Water stress

Further image reasoning from Gemma 4
will improve confidence.
climate_warning:
High temperature and irregular rainfall
can increase tomato stress and disease pressure.
recommendations: Monitor insect vectors such as whiteflies
Apply balanced fertilizer based on soil condition
